# ADR <number>: <title>

Status: Draft
Owner: <owner>
Created: <yyyy-mm-dd>
Linked proposal: <path-or-none>
Linked spec: <path-or-none>
Linked plan: <path-or-none>
Support-tier impact: <none|surface and intended tier change>
Policy impact: <none|ledger or rule affected>

## Context

Describe the forces, constraints, and existing decisions that make this decision
necessary.

## Decision

State the durable decision in a form future contributors can apply without chat
history.

## Consequences

List expected benefits, costs, tradeoffs, and operational responsibilities.

## Required evidence

List evidence needed to validate that the decision is implemented or still
appropriate.

## Non-goals

List nearby decisions this ADR does not make.

## Claim boundary

State which claims this decision supports and which it does not support.

## Rollback or supersession

Describe how this decision can be rolled back, amended, or superseded.
